name: ExtensionMedicinalProductDefinition_Indication
title: R5: Description of indication(s) for this product, used when structured indications are not required (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MedicinalProductDefinition.indication` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MedicinalProductDefinition.indication` 0..1 `markdown`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MedicinalProductDefinition.indication` 0..1 `markdown`
*  R4B: `MedicinalProductDefinition.indication` 0..1 `markdown`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.indication` has a context of MedicinalProduct based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicinalProduct`.
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.indication` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Description of indication(s) for this product, used when structured indications are not required (new)
element.comment:
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.indication` has a context of MedicinalProduct based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MedicinalProduct`.
Element `MedicinalProductDefinition.indication` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: Description of indication(s) for this product, used when structured indications are not required
element.definition: Description of indication(s) for this product, used when structured indications are not required. In cases where structured indications are required, they are captured using the ClinicalUseDefinition resource. An indication is a medical situation for which using the product is appropriate.
